query:
update tenants set selena_config = jsonb_set(coalesce(selena_config, '{}'::jsonb), '{proposal_terms}', to_jsonb('Payment: 50% deposit due upon acceptance; remaining balance due upon completion. Accepted methods: credit card, check, or bank transfer. Late payments may incur a 1.5% monthly finance charge.

Warranty: Workmanship is guaranteed for 30 days from completion. Plant material is warrantied per grower terms where applicable; normal wear, weather damage, and lack of client-side maintenance are excluded.

Cancellation: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before a scheduled visit may be subject to a trip fee. Deposits for custom/project work are non-refundable once materials have been ordered.

Scope: This quote reflects only the scope of work described above. Additional work is quoted separately and requires client approval before proceeding.

Validity: This quote is valid for the period stated above; pricing may change after expiration.'::text)) where id = 'cf50c81f-f726-48e0-82a8-673f1112fbe8';
